title: Poondi Arugar Temple
tagline: Poondi Arugar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Poondi Arugar Temple is a Jain temple which located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from Arani, Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Poondi Arugar Temple is a Jain temple which located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from Arani, Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple was built by Cholas. It is one of the protected monuments in Tamil Nadu declared by Archaeological Survey of India.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Arnee
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Arnee (or Battle of Arni) occurred on 3 December 1751 during the Second Carnatic War. A British-led force under the command of Robert Clive defeated and routed a much larger Franco-Indian force under the command of Raza Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Aarani Municipality
topPlaces.description: Aarani is a municipality city in district of Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu, India. The Aarani city is divided into 33 wards for which elections are held every 5 years.

topPlaces.name: Arni Fort bus terminus
topPlaces.description: Arani Fort bus station, is the city of Arni's main bus station. Arni is the second largest town in Tiruvannamalai district after Tiruvannamalai city.

topPlaces.name: Satya Vijaya Nagaram
topPlaces.description: Satya Vijaya Nagaram (also known as S. V. Nagaram), is a census town in Tiruvanamalai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is named after Satya Vijaya Tirtha, peetadhipathi of Uttaradi Matha whose Moola Brindavana (tomb) is in this town.

topPlaces.name: Arani, Tiruvannamalai
topPlaces.description: Aarani, officially spelled as Arani or Arni, and also known as Periya Aarani, is a town and major commercial, industrial and cultural hub and also a divisional headquarter in the Thiruvanamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Aarani taluk
topPlaces.description: Aarani taluk is a taluk of Thiruvannamalai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Aarani.

topPlaces.name: Mullipattu
topPlaces.description: Mullipattu is a village located in Arani, Tiruvannamalai, India. Mullipattu was formerly called Mullai Vanam, which means forest.

topPlaces.name: Thamaaraipakkam
topPlaces.description: Thamaraipakkam is a village in Arcot Taluk of Ranipet district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: The Battle of Arnee (or Battle of Arni) occurred on 3 December 1751 during the Second Carnatic War. A British-led force under the command of Robert Clive defeated and routed a much larger Franco-Indian force under the command of Raza Sahib.
Aarani is a municipality city in district of Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu, India. The Aarani city is divided into 33 wards for which elections are held every 5 years.
Arani Fort bus station, is the city of Arni's main bus station. Arni is the second largest town in Tiruvannamalai district after Tiruvannamalai city.

Satya Vijaya Nagaram (also known as S. V. Nagaram), is a census town in Tiruvanamalai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is named after Satya Vijaya Tirtha, peetadhipathi of Uttaradi Matha whose Moola Brindavana (tomb) is in this town.

Aarani, officially spelled as Arani or Arni, and also known as Periya Aarani, is a town and major commercial, industrial and cultural hub and also a divisional headquarter in the Thiruvanamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
Aarani taluk is a taluk of Thiruvannamalai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Aarani.
Mullipattu is a village located in Arani, Tiruvannamalai, India. Mullipattu was formerly called Mullai Vanam, which means forest.
Thamaraipakkam is a village in Arcot Taluk of Ranipet district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Poondi Arugar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Poondi Arugar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Poondi Arugar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Poondi Arugar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Poondi Arugar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Poondi Arugar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Poondi Arugar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Poondi Arugar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Battle of Arnee, Aarani Municipality, Arni Fort bus terminus, Satya Vijaya Nagaram, Arani, Tiruvannamalai.
